title: Old Letters
description: Changes the texture of the book and paper to the old one!
body:
## Description
This resource pack will change the texture of paper and books to ancient ones. They will be pale, which shows their antiquity. The books are implemented in the style of a scroll.
## Book inventory

![Book inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56d44e1e2675132888045ef927ca7630959b7d28.png)
## Textures of books and paper

![Book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d796526f5466440ce22f2a18148afad55c5decb.png)
